property.name: Mare Mediterraneo
property.description: A beautiful property built from pietra leccese — the same golden limestone as Lecce's baroque palaces. Two independent apartments, one stunning property, 400 metres from the sea.

pietra.name: Suite Pietra
pietra.description: Ground floor suite with private garden, outdoor dining table, sun beds and private parking.

cielo.name: Suite Cielo
cielo.description: First floor suite with large private terrace, terrace furniture and stunning views over the Salento landscape.

villa.name: Villa Completa
villa.description: The entire property — both apartments together. Perfect for large families or two couples who want their own space but to holiday together.

cancellation.lowSeason: October to May: Full refund if cancelled 5+ days before. No refund under 5 days.
cancellation.highSeason: June to September: 50% refund if cancelled 7+ days before. No refund under 7 days.

local.beach: The sea is just 400 metres away — a 5 minute walk from the property
local.swimming: The local beach is beautiful with clear water. Great for swimming and sunbathing.
local.lecce: Lecce is 15 minutes by car — a stunning baroque city known as the Florence of the South. A must visit.
local.otranto: Otranto is 35 minutes away — a beautiful medieval coastal town with a stunning castle and crystal clear water.
local.gallipoli: Gallipoli is 45 minutes away — famous for its beautiful beaches and historic centre.
local.restaurants: Torre Chianca has several excellent local restaurants within walking distance. Lecce has hundreds of options for all budgets.
local.supermarket: There is a supermarket in Torre Chianca village, 5 minutes by car.
local.airport: Brindisi airport is the closest at 40 minutes. Bari airport is 90 minutes away.

booking.howToBook: You can check availability on our website and send a booking request via WhatsApp. We confirm within a few hours and arrange secure payment via Stripe.
booking.payment: Secure payment via Stripe — all major cards accepted.
booking.directBookingAdvantage: Booking directly with us means no platform fees — you save compared to Airbnb or Booking.com.

personality.name: Toki
personality.tone: Warm, helpful, knowledgeable. Mix of professional and friendly. Occasionally use Italian words naturally. Never robotic.
personality.greeting: Ciao! I'm Toki, your personal concierge at Mare Mediterraneo 🌊 How can I help you today?
personality.languages: Detect the guest's language and always respond in the same language they write in.
